goal: Convert triage_draft_alert.yaml to use native plugins for Discord HTTP, GitHub, OpenAI, and Qdrant
summary: triage_draft_alert.yaml fully modernized. Replaced GitHub issue creation with github.issues.Create (2 instances), OpenAI drafting with ai.completion.ChatCompletion (1 instance), and all Discord/Qdrant HTTP with core.http.Request (5 instances). Five modernized Python scripts remain for complex operations: extract_data, parse_draft, update_qdrant, mark_created, mark_created_reaction. All use dependencies/taskRunner/containerImage with zero beforeCommands.
stepSummaries:
1. Replace GitHub issue creation Python with io.kestra.plugin.github.issues.Create [verified]
  2. Replace OpenAI drafting Python with io.kestra.plugin.ai.completion.ChatCompletion [verified]
  3. Replace all Discord and Qdrant Python HTTP calls with io.kestra.plugin.core.http.Request [verified]
  4. Remove remaining io.kestra.plugin.scripts.python.Script tasks where replaced [verified]
